title: Hotbar Numbered
description: It's simple. It's a numbers. I present you a numbered hotbar.
body:
![Banner of Hotbar Numbered](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HpAMfLxg/images/75ff85dfbbd3707dcf182802cf7eb2822779ab51.png) **Hotbar Numbered** adds numbered labels from 1 to 9 directly onto your hotbar slots and inventory containers, making it instantly clear which item corresponds to each hotkey — no guessing, no hesitation. Whether you're survival, PvPing, or just organizing your inventory, the numbered slots give you a clear visual reference at a glance. Perfect for players who rely on hotkeys and want a more intuitive, readable HUD. Designed to be fully compatible with other resource packs — just stack it on top and it works seamlessly. ## 📋 Installation Directly put the downloaded ZIP to `.minecraft/resourcepacks` folder. ## ✅ Compatiblity Full support for 26.1.X and older versions tested. It is also compatible with many resource packs, but make sure you put this one in first position.
Tested versions Not tested / In development
26.1.X 1.19.X
26.1 1.18.X
1.21.X 1.16.X
## 🎥 Screenshots ![Screenshots of Hotbar Numbered](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HpAMfLxg/images/54a512e6e453f0676e3bd22605132844b8c97371.png)
